title: Goety - The Dark Arts
description: Perform necromancy and dark rituals using the power of souls. Highly configurable.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c407721fb4e65d28cefc983c245e64666fb41984.png)

Long have you been curious of the vile magics of the illagers, specifically the Evokers. What fuels their magic? What do their Totems do besides providing a way to cheat death? How does one perform such feats?

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f28b6e1abdf4bb182ed8a073d9aedfe57cc48e.png)

Goety is a magic mod that aims to enhance the Minecraft experience by adding a ton of new features, including mobs, structures and a way to harness the power of the arcane. Summon all kinds of minions, fight off new dangers, discover the secrets of the world, its lore and most importantly, its treasures.

Highly recommend using JEI

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e83a81f115ac707f84fa98d4bd0910b395a7d21d.png)

If you have Patchouli Installed, you can craft the Black Book, which will provide information on the mod's features.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c137abafac7fc116fd9086b970638e0171114952.png)

## Features:
### Spells
Wear magical Robes and cast Spells, like summoning magical fangs, with a **Wand** or a **Staff** that's equipped with a **Focus**!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8984f6d0b5cea4db5fb3ec1a05596ebb41dc9034.png)

### Servants
Summon a variaty of Servants to defend you and attack your foes!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb71ed0338961b8a8517f38cc66e0526c6dcdb3d.png)

### Brewing
Brew all kinds of custom potions like a proper Witch!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b213cf254fd0b888650f84d10c5dac73b401b61d.png)

### Artifices
Use Soul Energy to power certain Artifices!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97ff216ea0164f5a41afe367f6d53963011b6548.png)

## And more!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/480ca4c75eea000c4fdbcc44a6b4d88b63a31853.png)

## Getting Started:
<details>
<summary>1.19 & 1.20</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b03022b7c3f843cbb9c7279b98718177ddc72dc0.png)

For the first step, craft yourself a Totem of Roots. With this, you must fill it with Soul Energy, by killing mobs. With it filled, you can craft several components needed to advance!

</details>

<details>
<summary>1.16</summary>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1826649c0ca14cc1161bcc61555578ffc8e7321.png)

For the first step, craft yourself a Cursed Infuser. The Cursed Infuser is used to craft several of the mods recipes, so I recommend you use JEI to discover them!

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec1740306d13236bbfc749c01a6c4de508e4a86a.png)

After a few steps, craft yourself a Totem of Souls so that you may store Soul Energy, which is obtained by killing a mob. Certain mobs generate more Soul Energy than others. Soul Energy is used to fuel your magics, whether be performing spells or healing your minions and more!

</details>

### Discord:

Official Discord Server: https://discord.gg/utQqkWUuDc

### Donations:

Feel free to buy me a coffee: https://ko-fi.com/polarice3

Or subscribe to my Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/c/u121478091


**Also, if you wish to port my mod to other versions, please ask for permission first, just for both etiquette sake and avoiding potential drama. (No need to ask for permission if you're making an addon lol)**
